summary: Scrubber bar size based on focus
description:
GIVEN a user has initiated playback

**NOTE:** check in games player and forge player

steps.action:
WHEN the scrubber is displayed
AND the user navigates up or down using the controller

**NOTE:** Elements or features below the scrubber bar have not been implemented yet.
steps.result:
THEN the scrubber bar decreases in width/thickness (up and down)
AND the scrubber bar doesn't move its position up or down
AND after focus is reassigned to the playback head, the scrubber bar increases in width/thickness (up and down)
AND the scrubber bard doesn't move its position up or down
AND the elements above the scrubber do not move/adjust up or down, regardless of scrubber focus state
AND the elements below the scrubber do not move/adjust up or down, regardless of scrubber focus state
